parity_scope: url is required and reduced to a safe upload basename
delete is disabled by default and enabled only by explicit flag
referenced uploads are discovered from Notes.content, Notes.cover_image, direct Note_Attachments static/uploads paths, and text attachment content
referenced originals protect their thumbnail companions
unreferenced original deletes original plus _thumb.webp or same-extension thumbnail companion
file mutations are confined to PRISM_GO_DATA_DIR/static/uploads
SQLite remains query_only because upload delete only reads DB references

allowed_next_step.reason: Upload delete reference-safe local/copied-data candidate is closed; the next active queue item is orphan image scan/delete cleanup.
